transcript: Yeah, this is Buddy over at United Parcel Service.
I'm the supervisor out here. Uh...
You tell your goddamn people not to harass me over the phone if you're gonna bring somethin' out to me.
We got a four hundred and twenty pound octopus coming to ya.
I have no idea what the hell you're talking about. What kind of octopus?
That's fine, bring it over. I don't know where the hell you're gonna put it.
Now, did Clint tell you we need a check from you?
Did... did Clint notify you, we are authorised to strike you, if we have to.
'[looped]' Now... [laughs] Now... [laughs] ...oh. I have no idea.
